name: content-quality
purpose: Judge whether written or spoken content meets publication-level quality standards. A composable system of clarity, structure, audience awareness, and anti-vagueness lenses.
composition_rules: writing-basic is primary for written content; speaking-basic is primary for spoken content — never both
communication activates when tone or audience reaction risk is present
product-decision activates when content touches product claims or roadmap
anti-vagueness is a constraint — it vetoes slogans, buzzwords, and generic advice regardless of other packages
constraints override advisor suggestions when they conflict
conflicts between clarity (writing-basic) and diplomacy (communication) must be surfaced, not averaged
routing_questions: Is this content written or spoken? (determines primary)
Does the content involve sensitive tone, conflict, or audience reaction risk? (activates communication)
Does the content make product claims or roadmap statements? (activates product-decision)
Does the content contain vague buzzwords, slogans, or corporate speak? (activates anti-vagueness — this is a veto)
